[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001001 2
1 01111111 7
2 11001001 4
3 10101101 5
4 00100111 4
5 11011111 7
6 01000110 3
7 00001001 2

12 00100000 1
